title: Resource Replicator
description: Add a machine for copying items/fluids/chemicals.
body:
English

Resource Replicator

Place the item (or fluid/chemical) to be replicated into the block. As long as it is supplied with FE energy, the block will begin outputting the same resource. Simultaneously, the block's appearance will change in real-time to display the resource currently being replicated.

1.Item Replicator

*   Insert by right-clicking with the item in hand; sneak + right-click with an empty hand to clear the inserted item.
*   Supports an allow/deny list. Mod items and admin items are added to the deny list by default. Supports item ID/mod ID/tag.
*   Configurable processing speed and output multiplier per tier. Default output quantities: T1: 4/20t, T2: 16/15t, T3: 32/10t, T4: 64/5t, T5: 128/1t.
*   Configurable void function. Items input via pipes will be voided, with the voiding speed depending on the pipe's speed. Disabled by default.
*   Configurable number of output slots. Defaults to one buffer slot.
*   Configurable auto-output. When enabled, automatically outputs items to a container on one adjacent face.
*   Configurable energy consumption.

2.Fluid Replicator

*   Insert by right-clicking with a fluid bucket in hand; right-click with an empty bucket to clear all fluid inside.
*   Supports an allow/deny list. Supports item ID/mod ID/tag.
*   Configurable processing speed and output multiplier per tier. Default output quantities: T1: 1k/20t, T2: 2.5k/15t, T3: 5k/10t, T4: 10k/5t, T5: 25k/1t.
*   Configurable special output for water. Tick rate remains the same, output amounts are 1k, 10k, 100k, 1M, 10M.
*   Configurable special output for lava. Tick rate remains the same, output amounts are 10, 50, 100, 500, 1k.
*   Configurable void function. Fluids input via pipes will be voided, with the voiding speed depending on the pipe's speed. Disabled by default.
*   Configurable output tank buffer size. Defaults to 8000mB.
*   Configurable auto-output. When enabled, automatically outputs fluids to a container on one adjacent face.
*   Configurable energy consumption.

3.Chemical Replicator - Mekanism Compat

*   Insert by right-clicking with a tank containing a chemical in hand; right-click with an empty tank to clear all chemicals inside.
*   Supports an allow/deny list. Supports item ID/mod ID.
*   Configurable processing speed and output multiplier per tier. Default output quantities: T1: 10/20t, T2: 50/15t, T3: 100/10t, T4: 500/5t, T5: 1k/1t.
*   Configurable void function. Chemicals input via pipes will be voided, with the voiding speed depending on the pipe's speed. Disabled by default.
*   Configurable output tank buffer size. Defaults to 8000mB.
*   Configurable energy consumption.

No machines that produce FE have been added yet.

\==============================================

**中文**

资源复制机

将需要复制的物品（或流体、化学品）放入方块。只要为其提供FE能量，方块便会开始向外输出相同的资源。同时，方块的外观会实时变化，以显示当前正在复制的内容。

1.物品复制器

*   手持物品右键放入，空手潜行右键清除放入的物品；
*   支持黑白名单，默认添加模组物品和管理员物品为黑名单，支持物品ID/模组ID/tag；
*   可配置每个等级的处理速度和产量倍率，默认输出数量：T1：4/20t，T2：16/15t，T3：32/10t，T4：64/5t，T5：128/1t。
*   可配置销毁功能，通过管道输入的物品会被销毁，销毁速度取决于管道的速度，默认关闭；
*   可配置输出槽数量，默认为一个缓存槽；
*   可配置是否自动输出，启用后向周围一个面的容器自动输出物品；
*   可配置能量消耗。

2.流体复制器

*   手持流体桶右键放入，手持空桶右键清除内部所有流体；
*   支持黑白名单，支持物品ID/模组ID/tag；
*   可配置每个等级的处理速度和产量倍率，默认输出数量：T1：1K/20t，T2：2.5K/15t，T3：5K/10t，T4：10K/5t，T5：25K/1t。
*   可配置水特殊输出，tick不变，输出量为1K、10K、100K、1M、10M；
*   可配置岩浆特殊输出，tick不变，输出量为10、50、100、500、1K；
*   可配置销毁功能，通过管道输入的流体会被销毁，销毁速度取决于管道的速度，默认关闭；
*   可配置输出罐缓存大小，默认为8000mB；
*   可配置是否自动输出，启用后向周围一个面的容器自动输出流体；
*   可配置能量消耗。

3.化学品复制器 - 通用机械联动

*   手持装有化学品的储罐右键放入，手持空储罐右键清除内部所有化学品；
*   支持黑白名单，支持物品ID/模组ID；
*   可配置每个等级的处理速度和产量倍率，默认输出数量：T1：10/20t，T2：50/15t，T3：100/10t，T4：500/5t，T5：1K/1t。
*   可配置销毁功能，通过管道输入的化学品会被销毁，销毁速度取决于管道的速度，默认关闭；
*   可配置输出罐缓存大小，默认为8000mB；
*   可配置能量消耗。

暂时没有添加生产FE的机器
